hero.title: Ship Work, Not Chaos
hero.subtitle: TaskOps is a lightweight task manager built for developers and small teams. Kanban boards, recurring tasks, smart reminders — everything you need to stay on track.

features.heading: Everything you need, nothing you don't

kanban.title: Kanban Board
kanban.description: Visualize your workflow with drag-and-drop columns. Move tasks between Todo, In Progress, and Done.

recurring.title: Recurring Tasks
recurring.description: Set up daily, weekly, or monthly recurring tasks that generate automatically.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.description: Get notified about overdue and upcoming tasks with priority-based alerts.

ordering.title: Persistent Ordering
ordering.description: Your board order is saved automatically. Drag once, stay organized forever.

footer: TaskOps · Built by Alessandro Rodriguez Rojas
